config._comment_tasks: 4 tasks = 1 per Kafka partition group; tune to match tasks.max ≤ topic partitions
config._comment_topics: The clean/validated topic written by the Flink ETL job
config._comment_upsert: Upsert mode performs an equality-delete on id-columns before inserting.
config._comment_upsert2: Requires Iceberg format-version=2 (row-level deletes). Handles Kafka
config._comment_upsert3: at-least-once redelivery: duplicate event_id → overwrite, not duplicate row.
config._comment_format: Format version 2 is required for upsert (equality deletes).
config._comment_format2: v1 tables only support append; setting this forces v2 on auto-create.
config._comment_autocreate: Auto-create the Iceberg table on first record if it does not exist.
config._comment_autocreate2: Schema is inferred from the Avro value; columns map 1-to-1.
config._comment_evolve: Allow the table schema to widen automatically when the Avro schema
config._comment_evolve2: gains new optional fields (Flink schema evolution → Iceberg column add).
config._comment_uri: tabulario/iceberg-rest container on the Docker bridge network
config._comment_warehouse: S3 warehouse root — must match CATALOG_WAREHOUSE in iceberg-rest
config._comment_region: AWS SDK v2 requires a region even for non-AWS S3-compatible stores.
config._comment_pathstyle2: Virtual-hosted style (bucket.minio:9000) requires DNS wildcard — not available in Docker.
config._comment_ssl: Plain HTTP in local dev — no TLS verification needed
config._comment_commit2: commit.interval-ms: how often the coordinator triggers a file commit.
config._comment_commit3: 60 s balances latency vs small-file overhead. Lower (e.g. 30 s) for
config._comment_commit4: near-real-time dashboards; raise (e.g. 300 s) to reduce file count.
config._comment_timeout: Time the coordinator waits for all task workers to acknowledge a commit
config._comment_timeout2: before declaring it failed. Must be < commit.interval-ms.
config._comment_ctopic: Dedicated control topic — avoids collisions when running multiple
config._comment_ctopic2: Iceberg sink connectors on the same worker.
config._comment_converters2: Value: AvroConverter reads ClickstreamEvent messages using the schema
config._comment_converters3: registered by the Flink job. Must match the producer-side serialiser.
config._comment_key: Key: StringConverter — Flink writes event_id as plain string bytes.
config._comment_errors2: tolerance=all: log and skip bad records rather than halting the task.
config._comment_errors3: All skipped records land on the DLQ topic for forensic inspection.
config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: dlq.iceberg-sink
